---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
e.g. "I can't do X because..."

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references that would help explain the request.
